question: Will SpaceX complete a Starship integrated test flight reaching orbital insertion by June 14, 2026?
reason: SpaceX's recent Starship V3 test flight on May 22, 2026, did not achieve orbital insertion.
evidence: The Starship upper stage performed a controlled descent and final burn before toppling into the ocean in a planned test explosion.
The Super Heavy booster failed its boost-back burn and crashed into the Gulf of Mexico, as expected.
The mission lasted just over an hour, concluding with reentry and splashdown near Western Australia.
The test included deploying 22 dummy Starlink satellites, two equipped with cameras to assess heat shield performance.
SpaceX streamed the launch live, with additional coverage by Space.com and NASASpaceflight.
This mission marked a significant step in Starship's development, as it was the first to use the upgraded launch pad and V3 architecture.
searchQueries: SpaceX Starship integrated test flight orbital insertion 2026
